{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ParseBuildRequest",
      "purpose": "Parse and validate the incoming build_request JSON, extracting action, repo, branch, config, and build_id.",
      "inputs": [
        {"name": "build_request", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON object with action, repo, branch, config, build_id", "source": "parent input"}
      ],
      "outputs": [
        {"name": "action", "type": "str", "description": "One of 'trigger', 'status', 'list', 'cancel'", "consumer": "RouteAction"},
        {"name": "repo", "type": "str", "description": "Repository name", "consumer": "RouteAction, CheckRunningBuild, ListBuilds"},
        {"name": "branch", "type": "str", "description": "Branch name, default 'main'", "consumer": "RouteAction, CheckRunningBuild, ListBuilds"},
        {"name": "config", "type": "dict", "description": "Build configuration with build_steps list", "consumer": "TriggerBuild"},
        {"name": "build_id", "type": "str", "description": "Build ID for status/cancel actions", "consumer": "RouteAction"}
      ],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["Parsing JSON", "Validation of required fields per action"], "out_of_scope": ["Business logic", "Database access"]},
      "preconditions": ["build_request is a valid dict"],
      "postconditions": ["All fields extracted and validated"],
      "behavior": "Extracts action, repo, branch, config, build_id from build_request. Validates that required fields exist per action (repo for trigger, build_id for status/cancel). Returns default branch 'main' if not provided.",
      "signature": "def ParseBuildRequest(build_request: dict) -> Tuple[str, str, str, dict, str]",
      "stop_decompose": true,
      "stop_reason": "Pure function - only data extraction and validation",
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "data_operations": [],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "Required fields must be present per action"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Parses valid request", "verification_method": "automated_test"}],
      "global_vars": [],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"], "derived_from": "root"},
      "requested_capabilities": []
    },
    {
      "name": "RouteAction",
      "purpose": "Route the parsed action to the appropriate handler child function.",
      "inputs": [
        {"name": "action", "type": "str", "description": "Action to route", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},
        {"name": "repo", "type": "str", "description": "Repository name", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},
        {"name": "branch", "type": "str", "description": "Branch name", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},
        {"name": "config", "type": "dict", "description": "Build configuration", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},
        {"name": "build_id", "type": "str", "description": "Build ID", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"}

      "outputs": [
        {"name": "build_result", "type": "dict", "description": "Result from the handler", "consumer": "parent output"}
      ],

      "preconditions": ["action is one of 'trigger', 'status', 'list', 'cancel'"],
      "postconditions": ["Correct handler called and result returned"],
      "behavior": "Based on action, calls the appropriate child function: TriggerBuild for 'trigger', GetBuildStatus for 'status', ListBuilds for 'list', CancelBuild for 'cancel'. Passes relevant parameters. Returns the result dict.",
      "signature": "def RouteAction(action: str, repo: str, branch: str, config: dict, build_id: str) -> dict",

      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "data_operations": [],

      "global_vars": [],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"], "derived_from": "root"},
      "requested_capabilities": []

    {
      "name": "CheckRunningBuild",
      "purpose": "Check if there is already a running build for the given repo and branch.",
      "inputs": [
        {"name": "repo", "type": "str", "description": "Repository name", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},
        {"name": "branch", "type": "str", "description": "Branch name", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"}

      "outputs": [

        {"name": "running_build_id", "type": "str", "description": "ID of the running build if any, else empty string", "consumer": "TriggerBuild"}
      ],
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["Querying builds database for running builds"], "out_of_scope": ["Creating builds", "Updating builds"]},

      "signature": "def CheckRunningBuild(repo: str, branch: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]",

      "requested_capabilities": ["builds.read"]

      "name": "TriggerBuild",

      "inputs": [

        {"name": "branch", "type": "str", "description": "Branch name", "source": "ParseBuildRequest"},

      ],

      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Trigger creates record and returns build_id"}, {"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Trigger while running returns error"}],

      "global_vars": [

      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"], "derived_from": "root"},

  "decomposition_rationale": "The BuildSystem parent orchestrates CI/CD build management. First, ParseBuildRequest extracts and validates the action and parameters from the input. Then, RouteAction dispatches to the appropriate handler based on action. For 'trigger', CheckRunningBuild first checks if a build is already running for the same repo+branch (enforcing the constraint), then TriggerBuild creates the record, runs steps, and stores artifacts. For 'status', GetBuildStatus reads the build record. For 'list', ListBuilds queries with filters. For 'cancel', CancelBuild reads and updates the status. All data operations go through children, and the parent only calls children in sequence. The decomposition covers all acceptance criteria and constraints.",

    "parent_inputs_covered_by": {"build_request": "ParseBuildRequest"},
    "parent_outputs_produced_by": {"build_result": "RouteAction"}
  },

    {"from_node": "ParseBuildRequest", "from_output": "build_id", "to_node": "GetBuildStatus", "to_input": "build_id", "note": "Build ID for status"},
